PowerShell($openapi = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json"; $paths = $openapi.paths; $insightSyncParams = $paths.'/api/instagram/insights/sync'.post.parameters; Write-Host "=== /insights/sync params ==="; $insightSyncParams | ForEach-Object { "{0,-16} default={1,-5} le={2}" -f $_.name, $_.schema.default, $_.schema.maximum }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== days caps across all GET endpoints ==="; $paths.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { $p = $_.Value.get; if \($p -and $p.parameters\) { $daysParam = $p.parameters | Where-Object { $_.name -eq 'days' }; if \($daysParam\) { "{0,-50} le={1}" -f $_.Name, $daysParam.schema.maximum } } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output "---OK---" } catch { Write-Output "Health check failed:"; $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $spec = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json" -TimeoutSec 5; $newPaths = @\("/api/instagram/branded-hashtags","/api/instagram/insights/growth-correlation","/api/instagram/insights/media/{media_id}/conversion"\); foreach \($p in $newPaths\) { $present = $spec.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $p; Write-Output "$p -> $present" } } catch { Write-Output "OpenAPI fetch failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($spec = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json" -TimeoutSec 5; $check = @\( "/api/instagram/branded-hashtags", "/api/instagram/branded-hashtags/{hashtag}/mentions", "/api/instagram/insights/growth-correlation", "/api/instagram/insights/media/{media_id}/conversion", "/api/instagram/insights/sentiment" \); foreach \($p in $check\) { $present = $spec.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $p; $marker = if \($present\) { "OK" } else { "MISSING" }; Write-Output "$marker  $p" }; Write-Output "---"; $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health"; Write-Output "Health: $\($h | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)")

Bash(py -c "from datetime import datetime; from app.repositories.comparison import resolve_calendar_window; until = datetime\(2026,5,19,12,0,0\); cur, prior = resolve_calendar_window\('mtd_vs_last_mtd', until\); print\('MTD cur=', cur\); print\('MTD prior=', prior\); cur2, prior2 = resolve_calendar_window\('ytd_vs_last_ytd', until\); print\('YTD cur=', cur2\); print\('YTD prior=', prior2\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json; $r.paths.'/api/instagram/branded-hashtags/{hashtag}'.delete.parameters | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3; "---"; $r.paths.'/api/instagram/branded-hashtags/{hashtag}/mentions'.get.parameters | Select-Object -First 1 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3)

PowerShell($paths = @\("/api/instagram/insights/sentiment/diagnose","/api/instagram/insights/sentiment/seed-demo"\); try { $spec = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json" -TimeoutSec 5; foreach \($p in $paths\) { $present = $spec.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $p; $marker = if \($present\) {"OK"} else {"MISSING"}; Write-Output "$marker  $p" } } catch { Write-Output "Backend not reachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Health: $\($h | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "Backend down: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($paths = @\("/api/instagram/insights/sentiment/diagnose","/api/instagram/insights/sentiment/seed-demo","/api/instagram/branded-hashtags"\); try { $spec = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json" -TimeoutSec 5; foreach \($p in $paths\) { $present = $spec.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $p; $marker = if \($present\) {"OK"} else {"MISSING"}; Write-Output "$marker  $p" } } catch { Write-Output "Backend not reachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($paths = @\("/api/instagram/insights/sentiment/diagnose","/api/instagram/insights/sentiment/seed-demo","/api/instagram/branded-hashtags"\); try { $spec = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json" -TimeoutSec 5; foreach \($p in $paths\) { $present = $spec.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $p; $marker = if \($present\) {"OK"} else {"MISSING"}; Write-Output "$marker  $p" } } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message })
